text: Of all the nonsense stuff this game said about the future, it pretty much got the internet right. I still find this funny!
author: @Fowdy92

text:
Mutant Rampage may have been fiction in 1993, but it has become REALITY in 2020.

Millennium Wars: War against Terror
Grey Tremor Plague of 2017: California's Various Diseases and Shit
Thanatos Meltdown: Fukishima Meltdown
Gene Pool alteration: SJWs trying to spread what I Call "Radical Gene Pool alterations"
Technology Advanced: That's EXACTLY what's happening
Bio-Engineers have created Animal-Human hybrids: China is doing THIS with Pigs and Monkeys
Athletes are commonly enhanced with bionics: Cybathlon in Kloten
Cybernet (fiber-optic network) links everything: Internet of Things and 5G

Mutant Rampage Bodyslam was just a regular game in 1993, but with the things it got ominously RIGHT, it won't be long until the world potrayed in it becomes OUR REALITY. In fact, I think it will DEFINITELY have happened by 2068. I think watching this video might be a good exercise to see how disturbingly CLOSE it is to where we are right now.
author: @tornadomimicyclone6707

text:
The year is 2023. Things, have changed.

The Ukrainian war ruined most of Eastern European lifestyles.

The coronavirus pandemic reduced the population by an 8th.

The sea level and global heat levels, advanced.

The government, in control of the 1% wealthy elite, is winning the war on poor and has destroyed/bankrupted the middle and lower classes.

Technology, advanced. Robot engineers, have constructed servants and drones to do most of their bidding.

Athletes commonly enhance themselves with steroids and get away with it.

Social engineers have successfully lobbied to give so-called “gender fluid” liars more rights than normal men and women in the courtroom.

The earth’s mass-communication now mainly consists of internet memes and social media, destroying the intelligence of younger generations and children.

text:
It's not the second half that matters anymore, it is the first half that's become relevant.

Millennium Wars: War against Terror
Grey Tremor Plague of 2017: California's Diseases increasing (and even MEDIEVAL DISEASES returning to haunt that state) since 2017
Thanatos Meltdown: Fukishima Meltdown in 2011
Gene Pool alteration: SJWs might end up causing what I'll nickname "Radical Gene Pool alterations," and ENCOURAGING said alterations.
Technology Advanced: Of course, it has always advanced.
Bio-Engineers have created Animal-Human hybrids: China is doing THIS with Pigs and Monkeys, and Japan has experimented with Animal-Human hybrids.
Athletes are commonly enhanced with bionics: Cybathlon in Kloten, enough said.
Cybernet (fiber-optic network) links everything: Internet of Things and 5G, which I've given the nickname "the Cybernet".

text:

author: @akalenda

text:
If we're gonna go into specifics...
Too much muscular squash'n'stretch. Changes in the view of characters aren't consistent with camera movements. Creases within the character silhouettes are drawn when they should be omitted. Motion isn't generated from a clear force, i.e. muscles driving the body with the ground as a base (in Disney terms, that'd be "poo followthrough,overlapping action,drag"). And the color compositions are really garish.
